title: Torm (the true god — and the false one)
bodyText:
God of duty, loyalty, courage, and **self-sacrifice**. **Kol** was his priest ([[pool-wizard]], [[shipton]]).

# The twist (grill 2026-07-09)
- **The true Torm opposes [[the-pool|the Pool]] doctrine.** He is *good*; he would never sanction feeding people into the Pool.
- **But the true Torm is likely gone** — either **consumed by the Pool**, or **tricked into sacrificing himself** when the Event ("all the crazy shit topside") hit. Fits the gods-shift.
- **A different god now wears Torm's face** — impersonating him and continuing to **trick mortals (Kol, the cult) into entering the Pool** as holy sacrifice. Kol is Torm's **dupe**, not his villain.

> [!dm] Rhymes with **Alaric wearing [[lathander]]'s light** (parked → [[children-of-lathandar]]): a recurring motif — **false gods wearing the faces of dead/caged real ones.** **Open (likely a Ch-2 reveal): who is the impostor Torm?** (The Pool's own will? [[lolth]]? a trickster? a herald of the cosmic harvester?) For now the cult simply believes they serve Torm.
